visual_identity.background_colour: Warm grey / Beige (#E0E0D0) - Paper-like matte texture
visual_identity.accent_colour: Neon yellow (#DFFF00) - Used for geometric shapes
visual_identity.line_colour: Ultra-thin grey lines - Blueprint-like auxiliary lines

typography.headings: Mix of serif and sans-serif typefaces.

slide_composition_patterns.pattern: Background warm grey/beige (#E0E0D0) with graph grid. Element name in large serif on left. Metadata ('Element 01 of 11', 'The What') in tiny typography. Monochrome profile photo cutout, enclosed by neon yellow (#DFFF00) circle. Concentric target overlay on face centre.

Background warm grey/beige (#E0E0D0) with fine grid. One-line definition statement in bold. Concept abstracted as geometric shapes: neon yellow (#DFFF00) hexagon, square, triangle combined with definition keywords at centre. Leader lines annotate each keyword.

Background warm grey/beige (#E0E0D0). Workshop scenes as 3-part collage. Monochrome photo cutouts positioned, neon yellow (#DFFF00) arrows and shapes show movement and relationships. Each photo labelled with technical drawing style ('01. EMPATHISE', '02. PROTOTYPE').

Background warm grey/beige (#E0E0D0). Screen split by ultra-thin vertical line. Left side: target element. Right side: commonly confused adjacent element. Each depicted as wireframe structural diagram. Neon yellow (#DFFF00) highlights or × marks show differences. Technical annotations clarify boundaries.

design_rules.rule: Strictly adhere to 3-colour composition: warm grey/beige (#E0E0D0) - background, monochrome (photos), neon yellow (#DFFF00) - shapes.
Never place photos as rectangles; always process as cutouts and blend into background.
Layer in order: background grid → neon yellow (#DFFF00) shapes → monochrome photos → foreground text.
